name: Tic-Tac-Toe
description: The classic pen and paper game of Xs and Os. Get three of your pieces in a row, column, or diagonally to win. Configure it to play multiple rounds of this fast paced game with your friends.

name: Rock Paper Scissors
description: Simple choice game played between two players. Rock breaks scissors, scissors cut paper, and paper covers rock. Configure it to play multiple rounds. Coming soon... addition options, like lizard, spock
